H8002.strongs_def: properly, requital, i.e. a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks

H8024.strongs_def: a Shelanite (collectively), or descendants of Shelah

H8027.derivation: a primitive root perhaps originally to intensify, i.e. treble; but apparently used only as denominative from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ),
H8027.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) triplicate (by restoration, in portions, strands, days or years)
H8027.kjv_def: do the third time, (divide into, stay) three (days, -fold, parts, years old).

H8029.strongs_def: a descendant of the third degree, i.e. great grandchild

H8030.derivation: feminine from the same as H8028 (שֶׁלֶשׁ); triplication;

H8032.derivation: or שִׁלְשֹׁם; from the same as H8028 (שֶׁלֶשׁ);
H8032.strongs_def: trebly, i.e. (in time) day before yesterday
H8032.kjv_def: [phrase] before (that time, -time), excellent things (from the margin), [phrase] heretofore, three days, [phrase] time past.

H8033.derivation: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));
H8033.strongs_def: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
H8033.kjv_def: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.

H8034.derivation: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));
H8034.strongs_def: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character

H8038.derivation: apparently from H8034 (שֵׁם) and H83 (אֵבֶר); name of pinion, i.e. illustrious;

H8040.derivation: or שְׂמֹאל; a primitive word (rather perhaps from the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה) (by insertion of the aleph) through the idea of wrapping up);
H8040.strongs_def: properly, dark (as enveloped), i.e. the north; hence (by orientation), the left hand

H8055.strongs_def: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome

H8070.strongs_def: Shemiramoth, the name of two Israelites

H8071.derivation: perhaps by permutation for the feminine of H5566 (סֶמֶל) (through the idea of a cover assuming the shape of the object beneath);

H8072.derivation: probably for the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה);

H8083.strongs_def: a cardinal number, eight (as if a surplus above the 'perfect' seven); also (as ordinal) eighth
